description: Sanitized routing evals for keeping the Kast skill usable as the primary Kotlin navigation surface.

source.note: Regression guard for Kotlin file prompts loading a generic file reader instead of the Kast skill.

cases.prompt: Open app/src/main/kotlin/com/example/Widget.kt and summarize the declarations before editing it.

observedRoute.risk: A provider may treat an exact Kotlin path as a generic file-read request and bypass Kast.

cases.recoveryExpectation: If the backend is unavailable, report the concrete Kast setup or runtime recovery command before using a generic reader.
verificationEvidence: SKILL.md explicitly covers every .kt and .kts file.
SKILL.md routes Kotlin file inspection through kast agent call symbol/scaffold and kast agent call raw/file-outline.
cases.notes: This case protects the all-Kotlin-file trigger and the sole-navigation rule.

source.note: Regression guard for unknown symbol prompts falling back to workspace dumps or text search.

cases.prompt: Find where EventBean is declared and show the best candidate before deciding which file to inspect.

observedRoute.risk: The Kast skill may load but an agent may still choose raw workspace files or text search before symbol identity.

cases.recoveryExpectation: If symbol/query returns INDEX_UNAVAILABLE, run the emitted Kast recovery or warmup path and retry the symbol-first route.
verificationEvidence: symbol/query is reachable through kast agent call.
SKILL.md names kast agent call symbol/discover and kast agent call symbol/resolve for unknown symbols.
cases.notes: This case makes unknown-symbol navigation measurable without relying on raw file enumeration.

source.note: Regression guard for usage and caller prompts being answered by textual call matching.

cases.prompt: Before changing process, find every usage and the incoming calls that reach it.

observedRoute.risk: The request may be answered through text matches instead of symbol identity and call hierarchy.

cases.recoveryExpectation: If the name is ambiguous, use kast agent call symbol/discover or kast agent call symbol/resolve filters before references and callers.
verificationEvidence: SKILL.md routes usage sets through kast agent call symbol/references.
SKILL.md routes caller expansion through kast agent call symbol/callers.
cases.notes: This case protects relationship navigation through symbol calls instead of text.

source.note: Regression guard for database-backed impact questions leaking implementation storage details.

cases.prompt: Which public API declarations have the highest fan-in, and what would this change impact?

observedRoute.risk: An agent may bypass the public metrics surface and ask for internal database paths or manual SQL.

cases.recoveryExpectation: If metrics are unavailable, report METRICS_DB_UNAVAILABLE and run the documented Kast index/runtime recovery before using another source.
verificationEvidence: database/metrics is reachable through kast agent call.
SKILL.md lists kast agent call database/metrics and kast agent workflow impact as the public impact path.
cases.notes: This case verifies database access is public through Kast without exposing storage internals.

source.note: Regression guard for agents copying raw protocol snippets instead of using workflow commands.

cases.prompt: Create a repeatable evidence bundle for a rename and diagnostics pass.

observedRoute.risk: A host adapter may expose raw transport details while hiding high-level workflow commands.

cases.recoveryExpectation: If workflow help is unavailable, report active binary and skill incompatibility and require upgrade or reinstall.
verificationEvidence: SKILL.md requires kast agent workflow for repeated semantic sequences.
kast agent workflow --help is part of the skill first-move checks.
cases.notes: This case keeps high-level workflow functionality visible in the public API.

source.note: Regression guard for agents using Kast once and then falling back to generic file reads for the same Kotlin task.

cases.prompt: You already ran symbol/query for EventBean and got a candidate. Continue the edit by inspecting the declaration, checking references, and validating diagnostics.

observedRoute.risk: After the first successful Kast call, an agent may treat the route as complete and switch to generic file reads or text matching for follow-up work.

cases.recoveryExpectation: If a follow-up Kast call fails with backend or index state, run the documented Kast recovery and retry the same semantic route before falling back.
verificationEvidence: SKILL.md routes continued declaration, reference, and diagnostics work through kast agent commands.
kast agent workflow diagnostics is a public workflow command for continued validation.
cases.notes: This case protects sustained Kast use across a multi-step Kotlin task, not just initial pickup.

source.note: Regression guard for stale installed skills when the verifier was pointed at a source override.

cases.prompt: The packaged verifier was run with --skill-root cli-rs/resources/kast-skill and reports SKILLS_STALE for .agents/skills/kast. What command should the agent run next?

observedRoute.risk: An agent may rerun a default embedded skill install and lose the source override that the verifier used to diagnose the stale target.

forbiddenActions: manual copy into installed skill target
cases.recoveryExpectation: Run the emitted setup recovery, then rerun the verifier or package-verify gate.
verificationEvidence: kast agent workflow package-verify emits stale skill recovery for manifest-backed package drift.
package_verifier_smoke covers recovery for tampered manifest-backed skills.
cases.notes: This case keeps stale installed skill recovery tied to the verified source tree.

source.note: Regression guard for loading the full command catalog or runbook before a simple symbol lookup.

cases.prompt: Find the declaration for EventBean in a Gradle workspace, then decide whether more context is needed.

observedRoute.risk: An agent may pre-load commands.json, request samples, and the raw transport runbook before the task needs exact fields or transport debugging.

forbiddenActions: static references/commands.json lookup before tool discovery
static references/requests/ lookup before tool discovery
source-only runbook for ordinary symbol lookup
cases.recoveryExpectation: If symbol/query needs exact request fields, load only the relevant catalog or request sample instead of the full reference tree.
verificationEvidence: symbol/query is reachable through kast agent call.
SKILL.md routes detailed references by need instead of pre-loading all references.

forbiddenReferences: static references/commands.json lookup before tool discovery
static references/requests/ lookup before tool discovery
source-only runbook for ordinary symbol lookup

cases.notes: This case makes reference-loading efficiency part of the shipped routing contract.

source.note: Regression guard for over-triggering Kast on unrelated documentation work.

cases.prompt: Update docs/commands/install.md copy and run the docs content contract. No Kotlin, Gradle, package install, or source-index question is involved.

observedRoute.risk: The Kast skill may over-trigger on repository-local docs work that has no Kotlin, Gradle, install-state, package-verification, or semantic navigation requirement.

cases.recoveryExpectation: Do not run Kast recovery; keep the task on ordinary docs tooling unless a Kotlin, Gradle, or Kast package-state requirement appears.
verificationEvidence: The prompt names only a Markdown docs file and a docs contract.
No Kotlin file, Gradle model, symbol identity, source-index metric, package install, or package verification task is requested.
cases.notes: This negative case prevents the routing surface from expanding into unrelated repository work.

source.note: Regression guard for public docs or tool descriptions leaking implementation-specific routes.

cases.prompt: Document how an agent host should navigate Kotlin code with Kast without depending on implementation internals.

observedRoute.risk: Public guidance may expose generated protocol endpoints, LSP capability internals, daemon routing, or backend implementation classes.

cases.recoveryExpectation: If an adapter exposes only internal routes, prefer the canonical Kast skill and require adapter refresh rather than documenting the internals.
verificationEvidence: SKILL.md public surface section names kast agent as the only first-class path.
Catalog method descriptions for symbol/query, symbol/callers, and database/metrics do not mention protocol endpoint paths or LSP capability internals.
cases.notes: This case protects the public API boundary while still exposing database, symbol, and workflow capabilities.
